tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose regulation or possible prediabetes, despite a low fasting glucose. There is also mild hyperchloremia and low total CO₂, which may suggest a mild metabolic acidosis. Renal function and electrolytes are otherwise within normal limits. Clinical correlation and further evaluation of glycemic control and acid-base status are recommended.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
